analyses.summary: Players are struggling to progress beyond wave 3, indicated by the low average wave reached and high kill count relative to wave progression. This suggests a significant difficulty spike or insufficient player/ally power scaling in the early to mid-game, leading to short, unproductive sessions.
analyses.analysisJson: {"summary":"Players are struggling to progress beyond wave 3, indicated by the low average wave reached and high kill count relative to wave progression. This suggests a significant difficulty spike or insufficient player/ally power scaling in the early to mid-game, leading to short, unproductive sessions.","problems":["Difficulty spike around wave 3-5","Low player/ally survivability against increasing zombie threat","Insufficient damage output to clear waves efficiently as waves progress"],"suggestions":[{"param":"ALLY_BULLET_DAMAGE","current":7,"suggested":9,"reason":"Ally damage is significantly lower than player damage, making them less effective at contributing to wave clear. Increasing their damage will help alleviate the pressure on the player and speed up enemy elimination, especially against tougher enemies introduced later.","impact":"+10% improvement"},{"param":"RUNNER_CHANCE","current":0.26,"suggested":0.2,"reason":"The Runner's high speed and decent HP can overwhelm players, especially when combined with other zombie types. Reducing its chance slightly in the early waves can ease the initial pressure and allow players to get a better grasp of the game mechanics.","impact":"+8% improvement"},{"param":"BRUTE_CHANCE","current":0.12,"suggested":0.1,"reason":"The Brute's high HP and damage can be a significant threat, especially when encountered early. A slight reduction in its chance can prevent early game-ending encounters and allow for more consistent progression.","impact":"+7% improvement"},{"param":"ALLY_MAX_HP","current":70,"suggested":80,"reason":"Ally survivability is low, leading to them being quickly eliminated and reducing the player's effective firepower. Increasing their HP will allow them to survive longer and contribute more consistently to combat.","impact":"+12% improvement"}],"earlyGame":"The early game appears to be a significant hurdle. With an average wave reached of 3.0 and a session length of 58 seconds, players are likely dying very early, possibly around wave 3 or 4, which is when Runners start appearing. The current enemy scaling and player/ally power levels do not seem to provide a smooth onboarding experience.","estimatedRetentionGain":"+15%"}
